flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Saint Joseph's College of Maine fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (60.1% → 43.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Saint Joseph's College of Maine vs the 2018–2022 baseline (930 vs 1.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saint Joseph's College of Maine rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.0k → $44.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Saint Joseph's College of Maine rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.0k → $44.4k).
